reason: Bug 1: Make releaseTask() idempotent — guard against double-release
plan_step: Apply Bug 1 (idempotent releaseTask), Bug 3b (30min TTL in reservePath), Bug 3c (30min TTL in reservation listing)
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/tool/coordination.ts b/packages/opencode/src/tool/coordination.ts
index a171bfef9..ace974bce 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/tool/coordination.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/tool/coordination.ts
@@ -272,6 +272,7 @@ export const releaseTask = Effect.fn("Coordination.releaseTask")(function* (
       .limit(1)
     if (rows.length === 0) return
     const claim = rows[0]
+    if (claim.status === "released" || claim.status === "failed") return
     await tx
